name: community_referral_sessions_72h
definition: Sessions from news.ycombinator.com, indiehackers.com, reddit.com referrers in 72h post-launch.
target_hint: Show HN front page (top 30): 2k–15k sessions in 48h. Average Show HN: 200–800. IH milestone alone: 50–300.

name: hn_points_4h
definition: Hacker News points on Show HN post within first 4 hours.
target_hint: 100+ = strong discussion; 200+ = front-page candidate on a normal day; <30 = title or demo mismatch.

name: hn_comment_count_4h
definition: Top-level comments on Show HN thread in first 4 hours (excluding maker).
target_hint: 25+ = healthy thread; <10 with low points = fix title or demo before retry.

name: community_to_signup_rate
definition: Signups from community referrers / community sessions in launch week.
target_hint: 5–15% for dev tools with tight message match; <3% = landing page or ICP mismatch.

name: founder_reply_sla_met
definition: % of HN comments replied within 60 minutes during H0–H+4.
target_hint: ≥90% during launch window — non-negotiable for thread quality.

name: cross_post_violations
definition: Count of mod removals or rule warnings across communities in launch week.
target_hint: 0 is the only acceptable target; any removal → pause 30 days on that platform.
